title: notocactus haselbergii
intro: Notocactus haselbergii, also known as the Haselberg's Notocactus or yellow pitaya, is a species of cactus belonging to the family Cactaceae. It is native to Brazil and is characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and distinctive stem segments. Notocactus haselbergii is traditionally used in folk medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea or used in tinctures to alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues, and to support overall immune function.
